headline: Squint Treatment for Children & Adults in Chennai
subheadline: AIIMS-trained Dr. Rajeswari evaluates and treats eye misalignment at every age -- the earlier it's addressed, the better the outcome.
metaDescription: Squint (strabismus) evaluation and treatment for children and adults in KK Nagar, Chennai with AIIMS-trained Dr. Rajeswari. Call or book online.
symptomsTitle: Could This Be Your Child, or You?
symptoms: One or both eyes turning inward, outward, up, or down
Child tilting or turning their head to see better
Double vision or vision that seems to compete
A childhood 'lazy eye' that was never fully treated
Eye strain or fatigue with near work

processSteps.title: Detailed Evaluation
processSteps.description: Assessing the type and degree of misalignment, and checking for amblyopia.

processSteps.title: Matched Treatment
processSteps.description: Glasses, patching, or vision therapy first where appropriate -- not every squint needs surgery.

processSteps.title: Surgical Correction
processSteps.description: When needed, precise muscle realignment surgery for function and appearance.
